result.title: How NVIDIA AODT Powers Network Digital Twins
result.description:
With NVIDIA Aerial Omniverse Digital Twin, developers design, validate, and iterate systems in simulation, before they enter the real world.
The platform is modular, designed for an ecosystem, and is already delivering.

Learn more: https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/5-new-digital-twin-products-developers-can-use-to-build-6g-networks/

result.title: The AI Grid: Orchestrating Intelligence Across Distributed Networks
result.description:
For AI to stay responsive and economical at scale, it needs to move closer to where data is created and intelligence is used. That’s where the AI grid comes in: connected, distributed sites operating as a unified, orchestrated computing platform.

With NVIDIA platforms, the network becomes a living AI grid, putting telcos and distributed cloud providers at the heart of how AI is experienced everywhere.

Learn more: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/industries/telecommunications/ai-grid/

result.title: Accelerating the Future of Automotive Engineering
result.description:
McLaren Automotive is redefining the limits of performance by integrating AI Physics and agentic AI into their design workflow. By leveraging the Rescale digital engineering platform powered by NVIDIA, McLaren has reduced simulation times from days to minutes.

In this video, McLaren Chief Programme Officer Christoph Meyer and CIO Alex Park and discuss how they are breaking down fragmented workflows to create a unified data loop. Discover how Rescale agents powered by NVIDIA are:
- Orchestrating Simulations: Automating pre and post-processing to free engineers for innovation.
- AI Physics Integration: Delivering real-time parametric optimization for complex carbon composite manufacturing.
- Data Liquidity: Making decades of engineering data searchable and reusable through cloud-native tools.

From the track to the lab, see how the partnership between McLaren, Rescale, and NVIDIA is fueling the next era of industrial digitalization.

Learn more about NVIDIA Industrial Engineering solutions: Computer-Aided Engineering (CAE) Solutions | NVIDIA

Explore Rescale’s Digital Engineering Platform: Rescale Expands Access to NVIDIA GPU-Accelerated Simulation Software and AI via NVIDIA's Cloud Partner Network - Rescale

#NVIDIA #McLaren #AIPhysics #DigitalTwin #AcceleratedComputing #IndustrialDigitalization #IndustrialEngineering
